text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 10 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT header 

VALUES: https://www.cms.gov/Regulations-and-Guidance/Administrative-
Simplification/NationalProvIdentStand/ 

Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This variable has been retired; therefore, the field is blank starting with the 2023 Release 1 RIF. 

Values and websites referenced may change over time. 

To search CMS’s NPI registry, researchers may use the following link:
